name: Tale of REN ~ [Searching for HEART droplets] ~
short_description: I am Mizu Ren Nanami... As a resident of the land of Ren, the time has come for me to embark on a mission to win the hearts of the people in Rostania, the city to which I’ve been assigned. Here, I’ll uncover secrets I never knew existed.
detailed_description:
🙏 Thank you for your interest in our game—we truly appreciate your support

✨ Buy the game today and get the DLC for free instantly!

🔥 For those who already own the game, it’s absolutely worth it! This DLC contains no story spoilers, so you can jump right in and play immediately.

About the Game

Tale of REN is a Visual Novel that immerses players in the journey of Mizu Ren Nanami,

a character sent to a distant world to gather the

"Heart Essence Droplets"—a vital key to saving the world of Ren, which is on the brink of collapse.

Players will experience a complex and multi-layered story where choices impact the storyline,

leading to various endings that can be selected as desired.

-Average playtime of 12-14 hours, depending on exploration and player decisions

-Choice-based paths that influence the storyline and endings

-Perfect for players who enjoy building relationships between characters

-Engaging comic-style graphics

-Hundreds of special illustrations and background scenes to create an immersive atmosphere

-Unlockable gallery and music tracks

-Journal system for taking personal notes throughout gameplay

-There is a system to unlock participation in special events.

In the land of Ren, every youth who reaches the age of 16 and passes a critical test must embark on a journey to fulfill a noble mission—to seek the elusive Heart Essence Droplets.

I am Mizu Ren Nanami... As a native of Ren, my time has come to set forth on a journey to win the hearts of people in distant lands. My destination is the city of Rosetania, and the young souls at the academy here are the ones with whom I must forge bonds to obtain the Spirit Dew.

Yet, as I undertake this mission, shadows of secrets from the past emerge, revealing truths I had never known...

Introducing characters

Name - Surname: Mizu (Ren) Nanami

Status: Temporary Exchange Student (Regular Class)

Personality: Nanami is optimistic, with a unique perspective shaped by her experiences as an outsider. She is highly independent, self-confident, and steadfast in her beliefs and core values. Observant, curious, calm, and patient, she rarely gets angry even when treated unfairly, and her sensitivity to her surroundings allows her to adapt well. While she may feel anxious in unfamiliar situations, she remains fiercely protective of those she cares about. Nanami is creative in solving problems, though she sometimes hesitates when making important decisions, reflecting her journey of learning to rely more on herself.

Name - Surname: Amory Vivian

Status: Grade 10 high school student (regular class) classmate and roommate with Nanami Personality: With a calm face and sharp, intense eyes, she is often misunderstood as being serious, making those around her reluctant to approach. However, in truth, she doesn't carry anything heavy on her mind. She's naturally quiet, but if it's a topic of interest like sweets, she can talk endlessly.

Although she loves sweets, she keeps this passion to herself, fearing it might not align with her cool image. Despite her love for making desserts, her skills are lacking, and she was teased about it as a child. These experiences have made her sensitive to being mocked about her appearance or image.

Deep down, she longs for acceptance from those around her and shows her warm side through subtle efforts to build friendships, even if she doesn't openly express it.

Name - Surname: Ava Darlene

Status: Grade 11 high school student (gifted class, specialized and top of the class.

Personality: Gentle, kind, and strict about rules due to family upbringing. Skilled at adapting to people or social situations from being trained since childhood. Quick-witted, insightful, and perceptive about people. Skilled in planning and managing people or projects. Ava doesn't like people referring to her by her surname because she feels it takes away her identity, making her feel like just a family representative rather than her own person.

Name - Surname: Zeno Hagan

Status: Grade 10 high school student (regular class), classmate of Nanami.

Personality: Appears indifferent and lethargic, but in reality possesses excellent calculation and analytical skills. Dislikes chaos or being the center of attention. Values reason and duty over emotional decision-making. Even though he seems uninterested in his surroundings, he always chooses what offers the greatest benefit in any given situation.

Name - Surname: Ajex Leonard

Status: Candy shop owne

Personality: Owner of the “Sweet Memories” confectionery shop in the town of Rosetania and has intriguing relationships.

Name - Surname: Asher Emerson

Status: Principal of Rosetania School

Personality: A kind uncle who is beloved by children with his warm smile and polite demeanor. He often spends time in his office or private garden to immerse himself in tranquility. He loves peace and quiet but is decisive in handling problems. Despite his kindness, he harbors mystery that makes people curious about his past.

Name - Surname: Elena Fairfax

Status: Newly appointed teacher and former intern teacher at Hana's old school during her junior high years, which made her acquainted with Hana beforehand.

Skills: Expertise in computer graphics

Personality: She has a thorough understanding of students.

Name - Surname: Hana Bennett

Status: Grade 10 high school student (regular class), Nanami's classmate and the star of the class.

Personality: Hana appears gentle and friendly, but in reality, she is ambitious and enjoys planning ahead. She is skilled at persuasion and creating a good image, but deep down, she fears her secrets will be exposed. She often resorts to complex methods rather than confrontation and experiences inner conflict between what is right and what she desires."

Name - Surname: Nadia Argento

Status: Grade 11 high school student (regular class), close friend and essential secretary of Ava.

Personality: Cheerful, fun to talk to, quickly understands Ava because they're close, often initiates conversation to keep the atmosphere lively, but becomes a workaholic when serious about workion to keep the atmosphere lively, but becomes a workaholic when serious about work.

Name - Surname: Olivia Genesis

Status: Grade 12 high school student (regular class), senior friend of Vivian.

Personality: An elder sister figure who is full of warmth, kindness, and always in a good mood. She earnestly listens to the opinions of those around her, especially in matters where she can offer help. Observant and ready to lend a hand as much as she can. She enjoys baking and often shares her creations with those around her to spread happiness and foster good relationships.
